text.title: Visibility of System Status Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the visibility-of-system-status methodology end-to-end.

step.name: action-inventory
step.input: Code grep / DOM scan / PM feature list.
step.action: Enumerate every async-trigger element with route + action label + duration_class (instant ≤100ms / short 1-3s / medium 3-10s / long >10s).

step.name: measure-latency
step.action: Run templates/loading-state.spec.ts to verify first-visible-feedback latency per action.

step.name: categorise-states
step.action: For each action record loading_state, success_state, error_state.present + auto_dismiss, trigger_disabled.
step.decision-gate: If duration_class medium/long with loading_state=none, severity 1.

step.name: aria-live-audit
step.action: Verify aria-live attribute: polite for success, assertive only for critical errors, role=status for persistent regions, aria-busy=true on loading.

step.name: fix-direction-and-validate
step.action: Write fix_direction per row; run scripts/validate-visibility-of-system-status.py; flag "ready for owner review".
